_template_note: Phase 0 protocol freeze. Replace every null or empty list before Phase 1. Do not change this file after discovery has started.

walk_forward._windows_note: Fill exact non-overlapping unseen test windows here before Phase 1.

execution.anti_lookahead: D1 bar only visible after its close_time has passed

d1_h4_alignment._allow_exact_matches_note: Replace null with boolean true or false before Phase 1. true means d1_close_time <= h4_close_time is allowed; false means strict d1_close_time < h4_close_time.

benchmark_seal.appendix_a_embargo: Do not use Appendix A until Phase 5 is fully complete: frozen_spec.json written, holdout results recorded, and mandatory evals #2, #4, #5, #7a, #8 recorded.

hard_criteria._mapping_note: These keys decompose RESEARCH_PROMPT_V4 hard acceptance criteria into machine-readable checks.

verdict_definitions.SUPERIOR: passes all hard criteria AND paired bootstrap P(delta>0) >= 0.90 vs best benchmark AND no regime where candidate materially underperforms benchmarks
verdict_definitions.COMPETITIVE: passes all hard criteria, positive on unseen data, but does not meet SUPERIOR threshold on paired comparison
verdict_definitions.NO_ROBUST_IMPROVEMENT: fails one or more hard criteria, or clearly dominated by benchmarks across all evaluation dimensions
verdict_definitions.ABANDONED: session stopped before Phase 6 due to dead-end or protocol constraint
